Dpu Scd 218 At 9:00 Am. On June 3, 2003
Off Calendar Jun-03-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S, Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Margaret DelCoto.
Appearances:
Douglas Hollooway, Esq. for Plaintiff Trinity Capital Corp.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants Misha Maya, Inc. Dba Metropolitan Cleaners and George Godoredtsky.
Principal of $56,449.35
Attorney's fees of $2,500.00
Costs of $284.50
Interest of $1,887.34 For the total of $61,121.19
Does 1-10 are dismissed.
Judgment signed in open court.
